tasks.title: Create Browser Extension for Quick Scraping
evidence: path: README.md :: usage examples :: all require terminal or web UI, no browser integration
path: docs/usage.md :: CLI examples :: no browser bookmarklet or extension mentioned
workflow: user browsing must manually copy URL, open terminal, and run spartan command
external: https://chrome.google.com/webstore :: popular scrapers like Web Scraper, Instant Data Scraper have browser extensions
plan: Create extensions/ directory with Chrome/Firefox extension manifest
Build popup UI for quick scrape with template selection
Implement context menu integration (right-click any page to scrape)
Add visual selector picker directly in browser page
Create 'Send to Spartan' button that submits to API with current URL
Implement extraction preview in extension popup
Add API key authentication for extension requests
Create installation documentation and publish to Chrome Web Store
Verify by installing extension, navigating to a webpage, right-clicking, and selecting 'Scrape with Spartan'

tasks.title: Add Cross-Job Content Deduplication Service
evidence: path: internal/research/simhash.go :: simhash implementation :: only used within research pipeline
path: internal/crawl/crawl.go :: duplicate detection :: only URL-level dedup, no content comparison
path: docs/architecture.md :: research workflow :: simhash mentioned only for research clustering
workflow: spartan crawl --url X then spartan crawl --url X again :: no warning that content already exists
plan: Create internal/dedup/ package with content fingerprinting service
Extend simhash implementation for cross-job content comparison
Add content hash index in database for fast duplicate lookup
Implement configurable similarity threshold (exact, near-duplicate, similar)
Add dedup options to crawl requests (skip, flag, or merge duplicates)
Create API endpoint to query for duplicates of a given URL/content
Add Web UI dedup explorer showing duplicate clusters across jobs
Implement automatic duplicate detection during crawl (optional)
Verify by crawling same content twice and seeing deduplication service identify the match

tasks.title: Implement Automatic Form Discovery and Filling
evidence: path: internal/fetch/form_detect.go :: form detection :: detects forms but limited classification only
path: internal/fetch/form_detect_classify.go :: classifyForm function :: identifies form type but no filling
path: docs/usage.md :: login flow flags :: requires manual CSS selector specification
workflow: spartan scrape --login-url :: requires knowing exact field selectors in advance
plan: Extend form detection to identify all input fields with semantic classification
Create form schema inference (detect search forms, contact forms, login forms, etc.)
Implement automatic field mapping by label text and input type
Add form filling API with field values by semantic name (not just selectors)
Support multi-step form workflows with confirmation detection
Create visual form builder in Web UI showing detected forms
Add CLI command: spartan form fill --url <url> --data '{"email": "test@example.com"}'
Implement form submission and result capture
Verify by pointing at a page with a form, having fields auto-detected, and filling them without manual selectors
